mapper.select:
SELECT ash.id, ash.shift_name, ash.shift_type, ash.start_time, ash.end_time, ash.allow_late, ash.is_cross_day, ash.week_day, ash.night_allowance, ash.del_flag, ash.dept_id, ash.staff_ids, di.dept_name FROM attendance_shift ash LEFT JOIN dept_info di on (di.id = ash.dept_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ash.shift_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.shiftName},'%')
AND ash.shift_type = #{queryForm.shiftType}
order by ash.id desc
